description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by lush trees and landscaping, featuring a flat roof and a mix of geometric forms. The front facade includes a prominent bay window and a driveway with two parked cars, one red and one blue. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and muted pastel colors, with large windows providing ample natural light. The house is set back from the street with a manicured lawn and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear and sides of the house are bordered by dense greenery, offering privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and pastel-colored exterior, surrounded by trees and landscaping. Features a bay window, driveway, and manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, driveway, two cars, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, geometric forms, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with more trees and shrubs, limited window visibility, and a secluded backyard feel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear patio area, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay window and varied window sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, and a prominent bay window; no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
